text: What is the preferred dataset name? The proposed name bq-$sys.func.LOWER($session.params.Operating_company)-$sys.func.LOWER($session.params.Application_short_name) is aligned to the project name and the naming convention.

What is the preferred duration in days for the dataset time travel window ? You can access changed or deleted data from any point within the time travel window, which covers the past seven days by default.

parameters.description: BigQuery dataset time travel window configuration
